Buvac Talk
James Pearce

Q: Zeljko Buvac is still listed on the club website. Surely the club need to make an announcement? Do you think we’ll have official confirmation anytime soon?

A: There won’t be an announcement from the club until the terms of his exit have been agreed. I thought it would have happened before now but clearly it has dragged on with lawyers involved.

I certainly don’t expect Buvac to return to Liverpool. Officially, he’s still first assistant coach on the club site. That job really belongs to Pep Lijnders now but the Dutchman can’t be given that title until the loose ends from Buvac’s departure are confirmed.

Klopp Content
James Pearce

Q: Any chance Liverpool will buy a forward or creative midfielder in January if we stay in the title race?

A: Unless injuries hit, I’d be surprised if Klopp made additions to the squad during the January window.

He seems very content with what he’s got currently.

There is an outside chance that Oxlade-Chamberlain could make a comeback before the end of the season but he certainly won’t be rushed back.

It was such a serious knee injury he suffered and Liverpool don’t want to put pressure on him with any kind of timescale.
